title: Configure overstory runtime capability mapping
description: Add runtime.capabilities to .overstory/config.yaml: coordinator/lead/builder→claude, scout→gemini, reviewer→codex

title: Phase 2 Core Slimming: AI Provider SDK extraction
description: Extract Vercel AI SDK implementations to @linchkit/cap-ai-provider. Core retains AIService interface + noop impl + security layer (AIBoundary, PromptSanitizer, OutputValidator). Prerequisite: add Spec 55 life-system abstractions (Sensor/Signal/Detector/Baseline interfaces) to core first. File areas: packages/core/src/ai/, capabilities/cap-ai-provider/ (new).
closeReason: Merged: AI Provider SDK extracted to cap-ai-provider, core slimmed, Spec 55 life-system types added

title: EventBus field diff enhancement for record.updated
description: Enhance record.updated events to carry changedFields/before/after payload. ExecutionLogEntry.changes already has the data but it is not propagated to EventBus payload. This is a prerequisite for Chatter auto-audit. File areas: packages/core/src/action-engine/, packages/core/src/events/
closeReason: Cherry-picked eventbus field diff commit, fixed _old/_new key naming in record.updated payload. Also added optional includeDeleted param to ActionContext.get() type. All tests pass.

title: Fix 3 failing tests + 2 errors in test suite
description: Current test suite: 3003 pass, 3 fail, 2 errors. Identify and fix the 3 failing tests. These may be related to AnomalyDetector or other stale references from core slimming Phase 1.

title: Add OV common commands to Claude Code allowlist
description: Add ov/overstory CLI commands (ov status, ov mail, ov sling, ov merge, ov group, ov nudge, ov worktree, ov metrics, ov run, ov coordinator) to Claude Code settings.json Bash tool allowlist. Check current .claude/settings.json for existing allow patterns and add the missing ov commands.

title: Fix canonicalBranch to feat/m2 + stash-and-merge blocked branches
description: 1. Change .overstory/config.yaml canonicalBranch from 'main' to 'feat/m2'. 2. Run 'git stash' to clear dirty .seeds/issues.jsonl. 3. Merge pending branches in order: builder-test-fix/linchkit-abb1, builder-core-slim/linchkit-2281, builder-cap-ai/linchkit-2281. 4. Run 'git stash pop' after merges.
closeReason: Merged: canonicalBranch fixed to feat/m2, 3 branches merged
